rankings.title: KYC compliance loop continues to strain bank staff & account holders
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights an ongoing systemic friction in India's financial inclusion and banking efficiency.
rankings.why_it_matters: Persistent KYC hurdles increase operational costs for banks and frustrate customers, showing gaps in India's digital infrastructure.

rankings.title: Handset business fading on spike in memory prices; smartphone market could shrink more than 13% this year
rankings.india_relevance: Global component price shock directly impacts India's massive smartphone market.
rankings.why_it_matters: Rising memory costs could depress smartphone sales, hurting brands, retailers, and app ecosystem growth in a key consumer sector.

rankings.title: Smaller towns to drive next growth cycle in Indian housing market: Report
rankings.india_relevance: Identifies the next geographic frontier for India's real estate sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shift in demand to Tier 2/3 cities has implications for developers, construction materials, home finance, and urban development.

rankings.title: Raghuram Rajan: Will AI spell a job scarcity? It’s time for policymakers to begin scenario planning
rankings.india_relevance: Credible voice outlines a critical policy challenge for India's labour-abundant economy.
rankings.why_it_matters: Rajan urges proactive planning for AI's labour market disruption, a vital debate for India's education and social security frameworks.

rankings.title: Airbus sees demand boost for helicopters in India, projects demand for 1,000 civil choppers in two decades
rankings.india_relevance: Signals a long-term growth trajectory for a niche but strategic aviation segment in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Points to emerging demand in tourism, emergency services, and regional connectivity, indicating infrastructural and regulatory evolution.
